subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Bahá unto him who hath believed and been guided, and hath turned away from such as have denied and transgressed, and whom their rejection hath not deterred [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من البهاء الی الذی آمن و هدی و اعرض عمن کفر و بغی و مامنعه اعراض
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @chastisement and requital, @twin Manifestations, @call to action
